name: Insurance Change Mid-Claim Sandy

mainEntity.name: What if employer changes insurance mid-claim in Sandy?
mainEntity.text: What if employer changes insurance mid-claim in Sandy?

acceptedAnswer.text: New carrier assumes; notify Labor Commission of change[4].

suggestedAnswer.text: Sandy: Continuity required. Track via Form 122 updates. Prevents payment gaps[4].

description: New carrier assumes; notify Labor Commission of change[4].
